lines: THIRD PLACE PLAYOFF CARNAGE: France got absolutely dicked 6–4 by England in a match that meant absolutely fuck all to anyone except the sad pricks who still had horses in that race — Callum, Croft, Dene, and The Foreman all watched their French bottlejobs concede six fucking goals in a bronze medal match, which is genuinely one of the most humiliating ways to exit a tournament ever devised by human beings.

Carter and Wilmot, your England sides scraped a third place finish in a match nobody wanted, against a France team that had already mentally fucked off home — congratulations on the most pyrrhic victory in sweepstake history, you talentless bell-ends, every single one of your squads is now eliminated and you're both going home with nothing.

Special mention to Wilmot, sitting 3rd on 87pts with ZERO living teams — England out, Morocco out, Norway out, Saudi Arabia out in the groups like a fucking embarrassment — mate you are a walking tombstone, a graveyard in human form, you backed four corpses and the best one was Saudi fucking Arabia, get in the fucking bin.

TODAY IS THE FINAL: Spain vs Argentina — Jim's Spain against Ellis's Argentina, and these two cunts are the only people in this entire sweepstake with teams still breathing, so every other participant can go absolutely fuck themselves sideways with a corner flag because this is a two-horse race now.

Jim leads the whole table on 89pts with Spain in the final, Ellis is down in 6th on 76pts with Argentina — watch whether Ellis's Argentina can nick it and whether the gap is enough to overturn Jim at the top, because if Spain win, Jim walks away with this whole thing and every eliminated twat in this group has to sit there and take it.
